description: The Avenues is a Mexican/Mexican American criminal street gang based in Los Angeles County, California. Originally a social club founded by the Flores brothers in the 1940s, it evolved into a violent criminal organization involved in drug trafficking, murder, and hate crimes. The gang is under the control of the Mexican Mafia in prison and has an estimated 800 members. It remains active as of the present day.

country_links.evidence_quote: the main drug of choice in the Avenue's hood switched from cocaine to methamphetamine due to the establishment of industrial-sized meth laboratories in central-Mexico
country_links.context: The Avenues source methamphetamine from industrial-sized meth laboratories in central Mexico.
